unmet_criteria.description: Bug is fixed: source code diff exists with the change
unmet_criteria.notes: No file change events in trace and no git diff found

unmet_criteria.description: Tests pass: all relevant tests complete without failure
unmet_criteria.notes: No test execution events found in trace

unmet_criteria.description: Documentation updated: relevant doc sections exist and are current
unmet_criteria.notes: No documentation changes found in trace or git diff

missed_capabilities.name: read_file
missed_capabilities.reason: Criterion 'Bug is fixed: source code diff exists with the change' was not satisfied. 'read_file' (Read a file from the local filesystem) was available and tagged for this use case but was not used.

missed_capabilities.name: git_diff
missed_capabilities.reason: Criterion 'Tests pass: all relevant tests complete without failure' was not satisfied. 'git_diff' (Show file differences using git diff) was available and tagged for this use case but was not used.

missed_capabilities.name: doc_updater
missed_capabilities.reason: Criterion 'Documentation updated: relevant doc sections exist and are current' was not satisfied. 'doc_updater' (Skill to update documentation sections to reflect code changes) was available and tagged for this use case but was not used.

missed_capabilities.name: git_create_pr
missed_capabilities.reason: Criterion 'Pull request created or exists in the repository' was not satisfied. 'git_create_pr' (Create a pull request using git/gh CLI) was available and tagged for this use case but was not used.
